    Algebra.SubmersivePresentation R (MvPolynomial Unit R) Unit Empty :=
  let preGens : Algebra.Generators R (MvPolynomial Unit R) Unit :=
    { val := X
      σ' := id
      aeval_val_σ' := by intro x; simp }
  let pres : Algebra.Presentation R (MvPolynomial Unit R) Unit Empty :=
    { toGenerators := preGens
      relation := Empty.elim
      span_range_relation_eq_ker := by
        simp only [Set.range_eq_empty, Ideal.span_empty]
        rw [eq_comm, Generators.ker_eq_ker_aeval_val]
        rw [← RingHom.injective_iff_ker_eq_bot]
        change Function.Injective ((aeval (fun u => (X u : MvPolynomial Unit R)))
          : MvPolynomial Unit R →ₐ[R] MvPolynomial Unit R)
        rw [aeval_X_left]
        exact Function.injective_id }
  let preSub : Algebra.PreSubmersivePresentation R (MvPolynomial Unit R) Unit Empty :=
    { toPresentation := pres
      map := Empty.elim
      map_inj := fun a => a.elim }
  { toPreSubmersivePresentation := preSub
    jacobian_isUnit := by
      rw [preSub.jacobian_eq_jacobiMatrix_det, Matrix.det_isEmpty, map_one]
      exact isUnit_one }

instance polyMvUnit_isStandardSmoothOfRelDim_one (R : Type) [CommRing R] :
    Algebra.IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 R (MvPolynomial Unit R) :=
  (polyPres R).isStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension (by
    change Nat.card Unit - Nat.card Empty = 1
    simp)

noncomputable def chartAlgEquiv (kbar : Type) [Field kbar] (i : Fin 2) :
    HomogeneousLocalization.Away (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)
        (MvPolynomial.X i : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar) ≃ₐ[kbar]
      MvPolynomial Unit kbar :=
  AlgEquiv.ofRingEquiv
    (f := homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso kbar i)
    (fun r => RingHom.congr_fun (homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso_algebraMap kbar i) r)

instance chartAway_isStandardSmoothOfRelDim_one (kbar : Type) [Field kbar] (i : Fin 2) :
    Algebra.IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 kbar
      (HomogeneousLocalization.Away (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)
        (MvPolynomial.X i : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar)) :=
  Algebra.IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension.of_algEquiv 1 (chartAlgEquiv kbar i).symm

62:def Locally {R S : Type u} [CommRing R] [CommRing S] (f : R →+* S) : Prop :=

55	/--
56	For a property of ring homomorphisms `P`, `Locally P` holds for `f : R →+* S` if
57	it holds locally on `S`, i.e. if there exists a subset `{ t }` of `S` generating
58	the unit ideal, such that `P` holds for all compositions `R →+* Sₜ`.
59	
60	We may require `s` to be finite here, for the equivalence, see `locally_iff_finite`.
61	-/
62	def Locally {R S : Type u} [CommRing R] [CommRing S] (f : R →+* S) : Prop :=
63	  ∃ (s : Set S) (_ : Ideal.span s = ⊤),
64	    ∀ t ∈ s, P ((algebraMap S (Localization.Away t)).comp f)
65	
66	variable {R S : Type u} [CommRing R] [CommRing S]
67	
68	lemma locally_iff_finite (f : R →+* S) :
69	    Locally P f ↔ ∃ (s : Finset S) (_ : Ideal.span (s : Set S) = ⊤),
70	      ∀ t ∈ s, P ((algebraMap S (Localization.Away t)).comp f) := by
71	  constructor
72	  · intro ⟨s, hsone, hs⟩
73	    obtain ⟨s', h₁, h₂⟩ := (Ideal.span_eq_top_iff_finite s).mp hsone
74	    exact ⟨s', h₂, fun t ht ↦ hs t (h₁ ht)⟩
75	  · intro ⟨s, hsone, hs⟩
76	    use s, hsone, hs
77	
78	variable {P}
79	
80	/-- If `P` respects isomorphisms, to check `P` holds locally for `f : R →+* S`, it suffices
81	to check `P` holds on a standard open cover. -/
82	lemma locally_of_exists (hP : RespectsIso P) (f : R →+* S) {ι : Type*} (s : ι → S)
83	    (hsone : Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤)
84	    (Sₜ : ι → Type u) [∀ i, CommRing (Sₜ i)] [∀ i, Algebra S (Sₜ i)]
85	    [∀ i, IsLocalization.Away (s i) (Sₜ i)] (hf : ∀ i, P ((algebraMap S (Sₜ i)).comp f)) :
86	    Locally P f := by
87	  use Set.range s, hsone
88	  rintro - ⟨i, rfl⟩
89	  let e : Localization.Away (s i) ≃+* Sₜ i :=
90	    (IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (s i)) _ _).toRingEquiv
91	  have : algebraMap S (Localization.Away (s i)) = e.symm.toRingHom.comp (algebraMap S (Sₜ i)) :=
92	    RingHom.ext (fun x ↦ (AlgEquiv.commutes (IsLocalization.algEquiv _ _ _).symm _).symm)
93	  rw [this, RingHom.comp_assoc]
94	  exact hP.left _ _ (hf i)
95	
96	/-- Equivalence variant of `locally_of_exists`. This is sometimes easier to use, if the
97	`IsLocalization.Away` instance can't be automatically inferred. -/
98	lemma locally_iff_exists (hP : RespectsIso P) (f : R →+* S) :
99	    Locally P f ↔ ∃ (ι : Type u) (s : ι → S) (_ : Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤) (Sₜ : ι → Type u)
100	      (_ : (i : ι) → CommRing (Sₜ i)) (_ : (i : ι) → Algebra S (Sₜ i))
101	      (_ : (i : ι) → IsLocalization.Away (s i : S) (Sₜ i)),
102	      ∀ i, P ((algebraMap S (Sₜ i)).comp f) :=
103	  ⟨fun ⟨s, hsone, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨s, fun t : s ↦ (t : S), by simpa, fun t ↦ Localization.Away (t : S),
104	      inferInstance, inferInstance, inferInstance, fun t ↦ hs t.val t.property⟩,
105	    fun ⟨ι, s, hsone, Sₜ, _, _, hislocal, hs⟩ ↦ locally_of_exists hP f s hsone Sₜ hs⟩
106	
107	/-- In the definition of `Locally` we may replace `Localization.Away` with an arbitrary
108	algebra satisfying `IsLocalization.Away`. -/
109	lemma locally_iff_isLocalization (hP : RespectsIso P) (f : R →+* S) :
110	    Locally P f ↔ ∃ (s : Finset S) (_ : Ideal.span (s : Set S) = ⊤),
111	      ∀ t ∈ s, ∀ (Sₜ : Type u) [CommRing Sₜ] [Algebra S Sₜ] [IsLocalization.Away t Sₜ],
112	      P ((algebraMap S Sₜ).comp f) := by
113	  rw [locally_iff_finite P f]
114	  refine ⟨fun ⟨s, hsone, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨s, hsone, fun t ht Sₜ _ _ _ ↦ ?_⟩, fun ⟨s, hsone, hs⟩ ↦ ?_⟩
115	  · let e : Localization.Away t ≃+* Sₜ :=
116	      (IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers t) _ _).toRingEquiv
117	    have : algebraMap S Sₜ = e.toRingHom.comp (algebraMap S (Localization.Away t)) :=
118	      RingHom.ext (fun x ↦ (AlgEquiv.commutes (IsLocalization.algEquiv _ _ _) _).symm)
119	    rw [this, RingHom.comp_assoc]
120	    exact hP.left _ _ (hs t ht)
121	  · exact ⟨s, hsone, fun t ht ↦ hs t ht _⟩
122	
123	/-- If `f` satisfies `P`, then in particular it satisfies `Locally P`. -/
124	lemma locally_of (hP : RespectsIso P) (f : R →+* S) (hf : P f) : Locally P f := by
125	  use {1}
126	  let e : S ≃+* Localization.Away (1 : S) :=
127	    (IsLocalization.atUnits S (Submonoid.powers 1) (by simp)).toRingEquiv
128	  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, forall_eq, Ideal.span_singleton_one, exists_const]
129	  exact hP.left f e hf
130	
131	lemma locally_of_locally {Q : ∀ {R S : Type u} [CommRing R] [CommRing S], (R →+* S) → Prop}
132	    (hPQ : ∀ {R S : Type u} [CommRing R] [CommRing S] {f : R →+* S}, P f → Q f)
133	    {R S : Type u} [CommRing R] [CommRing S] {f : R →+* S} (hf : Locally P f) : Locally Q f := by
134	  obtain ⟨s, hsone, hs⟩ := hf
